task: place the grasped pink block inside the left cabinet
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white cabinet with an open door is visible, containing a red block. A white sink with a red block inside is in the foreground. The cabinet door has a black handle. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the red block inside the cabinet. Then, transport it to the sink. Finally, place the block inside the sink. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cabinet door handle to open it; Step 2 grasp the red block inside the cabinet; Step 3 transport the block to the sink; Step 4 place the block inside the sink.
Goal: inside(red_block, sink)
Scene: red_block, cabinet, sink, cabinet_door
Step 1: reach(cabinet_door)
  affordance_region: the black handle of the cabinet door
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, cabinet_door, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, cabinet_door) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_block)
  affordance_region: the red block inside the cabinet
  contact: holding(red_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_block)
Step 3: transport(red_block -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink
  spatial: above(red_block, sink, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_block)
  done_when: above(red_block, sink, 0.05)
Step 4: place(red_block -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink
  contact: surface_contact(red_block, sink) [completion]; released(red_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(red_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_block, sink) AND released(red_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the black handle of the cabinet door
the red block inside the cabinet
an empty area inside the sink
an empty area inside the sink
